caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Turks and Caicos
caribbean.paragraph: Turks and Caicos is experiencing moderate easterly winds up to 22 kt with wave heights reaching 5.4 ft and a dominant swell period of 6 seconds from the east. Rain probability is high at 77%, creating challenging conditions for marine and port operations while St. Thomas sees slightly lighter winds near 21 kt and less intense rainfall.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Haifa Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Haifa is experiencing moderate winds up to 17 knots with wave heights reaching 5.8 feet and a dominant WNW swell period of 6 seconds. The port faces a 78% rain probability, indicating significant precipitation, while Istanbul sees lighter winds at 12 knots and less impactful conditions.
